description_long: This is a modern, rectangular couch with a solid, dark wood or metal frame outlining its structure. The seat features a grid of large, plush, tufted cushions in a light gray fabric, providing a soft and inviting appearance. The backrest is composed of two thick, matching cushions, and the armrests are straight and boxy, matching the height of the backrest. Two accent pillows, one with a subtle geometric pattern, are placed on the left side of the couch. The legs are short, blocky, and dark, elevating the couch slightly off the ground. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy couch with light gray tufted cushions, dark frame, and two accent pillows. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with straight armrests and short block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, tufted seat cushions, two accent pillows on the left, and the straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the armrest height, and the placement of the accent pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, continuous back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, the seat depth, and a single accent pillow visible on the left.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and a single seat cushion divided into a grid of tufted sections; two accent pillows on the left side.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray with a tufted grid pattern on the seat and subtle geometric pattern on one accent pillow.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs in a dark material, exposed and positioned at the corners for stability.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a solid, dark frame outlining the sides.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions matching the seat in color and material.
